choices.text: #[event] struct PurchaseEvent {...} + emit!(PurchaseEvent { ... }) in instruction. Clients subscribe via program.addEventListener. Logged to tx logs; structured event data.

questions.explanation: #[event] + emit! macro for typed client events.

choices.text: let now = Clock::get()?.unix_timestamp. Solana Clock sysvar provides on-chain time. Validate require!(now < expiry, MyError::Expired). Don't trust client-passed timestamps.

questions.explanation: Clock::get() sysvar for trusted on-chain time.
